title: Handle Meshtastic ADMIN_APP metadata read requests
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.15 review found that Zephyr currently emits synthetic DeviceMetadata during want_config_id sync, but documented ADMIN_APP get_device_metadata_request handling is not wired in the active C adapter. What needs to be done: decode the relevant ADMIN_APP request path, return bounded synthetic DeviceMetadata using the same policy as staged sync, and reject unsupported admin writes deterministically. Acceptance criteria: native_sim test covers get_device_metadata_request returning metadata; unsupported metadata/admin writes return explicit no-op/error; behavior uses the t2hn.15 metadata policy and does not claim Meshtastic RF firmware.
